# /alm-extract

> Emit a `handoff.v1` (payload validated against `alm-extract.v1`) for the `alm` agent. F&O extracts use object-id prefixes (EXT/BDC/OPR/INT/DEN/SEC/WFL) in the work-item titles + field mappings per [constitution/07-alm-configuration.md](../../constitution/07-alm-configuration.md).

## Usage

```
/alm-extract [--feature <slug>] [--project <name>]
```

## Inputs

- `projects/{p}/d365-fo/features/{f}/plan.md`
- `projects/{p}/d365-fo/features/{f}/tasks/*.task.md`
- `projects/{p}/d365-fo/features/{f}/test-plan/**`
- `projects/{p}/d365-fo/features/{f}/spec.md`
- `project.config.yaml almProvider`
- [constitution/07-alm-configuration.md § Field/Priority/Status maps](../../constitution/07-alm-configuration.md)

## Execution flow

1. Build L1-L4 tree from plan.md.
2. Apply field/priority/status maps per `constitution/07-alm-configuration.md` (e.g., F&O object-id prefix → ADO custom field, F&O severity → JIRA priority).
3. Attach AC text to L3.
4. Attach test cases to L4.
5. Build `alm-extract.v1` payload.
6. Wrap in `handoff.v1`; validate.
7. Write `projects/{p}/_handoffs/d365-fo-to-alm-{feature}.handoff.json`.

## ID strategy

- L1 Epic uid: `fo-{feature-slug}-L1-01`
- L2 uid: `fo-{feature-slug}-L2-NN` per object-type category
- L3 uid: `fo-{feature-slug}-L3-NN` per FR
- L4 uid: `fo-{feature-slug}-{object-id}` (e.g., `fo-{slug}-EXT-12`)

## Output

- `projects/{p}/_handoffs/d365-fo-to-alm-{feature}.handoff.json`
